cards.front: What is the purpose of the `datetime` module?
cards.back: To handle dates and times in Python

cards.front: What is the difference between `strptime` and `strftime`?
cards.back: strptime parses a string into a datetime object, while strftime formats a datetime object into a string

cards.front: What is the purpose of the `date` and `time` classes in the `datetime` module?
cards.back: To represent and manipulate dates and times separately

cards.front: What is the `format` method of the `datetime` class used for?
cards.back: To customize the format of a datetime object when converted to a string

cards.front: What is the `timedelta` class used for?
cards.back: To represent a duration, typically between two dates or times
